prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GOLDSANDSCOOP-ORANGE Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor Metal Detector 8.5 inch Large Plastic Sand Scoop Treasure Hunting, Orange Description: Going treasure hunting? Then you need the ASR Outdoor 8.5" Orange Sand Scooper.

This sand scooper is super lightweight, making it ideal for scooping up sand to shake out treasures on dry, sandy beaches. Since it's constructed of durable plastic, it wont interfere with your metal detector making it easier to find treasure.

Simply use your metal detector to locate the target area, scoop up some sand in the target area and run the metal detector over the scoop. Then, gently shake the scoop side to side, allowing the sand to fall out of the holes and uncover the treasure. Make sure you have one of these before your next treasure hunt. Search Terms: sand sifter hand shovel plastic beach accessory metal detector tools detecting shovels probe beach flea digger scooper beachcomber Features: - SAND SCOOP FOR METAL DETECTING - The ASR Outdoor sand sifter digger trrowel is an essential accessory for metal detecting. It measures 9" in length and has a 6" wide mouth so you can easily remove rocks and sand while searching for treasure on the beach - 78 HOLES PER SCOOP - The plastic sand scoop features 78 holes, each with a diameter of 0.50". These holes will assist you with removing dirt and sand while locating your treasure on the beach or river bed - HEAVY DUTY PLASTIC SAND SCOOP - Constructed from reinforced, heavy-duty single piecemolded ABS plastic, the sand scoop is durable and will not rust or corrode so you can use it in any weather. Since it's made of plastic, you won't have to worry about any false positives while metal detecting - ULTRA-LIGHTWEIGHT DESIGN - The beach sifting scoop weighs just 0.50 pounds (8 ounces) making it easy to use for both kids and adults. It will fit inside most standard-sized backpacks and won't add too much to your carry weight - SPECIFICATIONS - Dimensions: 9" x 6" x 5.5"; Capacity: 3 Quarts; Material: Single Construction Durable Plastic; Color: Orange; Holes per Scoop: 78, Hole Diameter: 0.50" === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8.5 inch Orange Sand Scoop

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 8.5 in Orange Sand Scoop

anthropic.title_differentiation: Metal Detecting Accessory, 78 Holes, Lightweight Plastic, Beach Treasure Hunting, Non-Magnetic

openai.title_differentiation: 78 Holes, Lightweight ABS Plastic, Rustproof, 9 Inch X 6 Inch X 55 Inch, Beach And River Detecting
